results.question: List the id, first name and last name of the customers who both have placed more than 2 orders and have bought at least 3 items.
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id JOIN Order_items AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >= 3	e_commerce

current_rag.sql: SELECT T1.customer_id , T1.customer_first_name , T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING COUNT(T2.order_id) > 2 AND COUNT(T3.order_item_id) > 3

broader_rag.sql: SELECT T1.customer_id , T1.customer_first_name , T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING COUNT(T2.order_id) > 2 AND COUNT(T3.order_item_id) > 3

full_schema.sql: SELECT T1.customer_id , T1.customer_first_name , T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING COUNT(T3.order_id) > 2 AND COUNT(T3.order_item_id) > 3

results.question: What are the ids, first and last names of the customers who have ordered more than twice and have bought at least 3 items?
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.customer_id ,  T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id JOIN Order_items AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*)  >= 3	e_commerce

current_rag.sql: SELECT T1.customer_id, T1.customer_first_name, T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING COUNT(T2.order_id) > 2 AND COUNT(T3.order_item_id) >= 3 JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id

broader_rag.sql: SELECT T1.customer_id, T1.customer_first_name, T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING COUNT(T3.order_item_id) > 2 AND COUNT(DISTINCT T3.order_item_id) >= 3

full_schema.sql: SELECT T1.customer_id, T1.customer_first_name, T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING COUNT(T3.order_item_id) > 2 AND COUNT(DISTINCT T3.order_item_id) >= 3

results.question: Which customers did not make any orders? List the first name, middle initial and last name.
results.gold_sql: SELECT customer_first_name ,  customer_middle_initial ,  customer_last_name FROM Customers EXCEPT SELECT T1.customer_first_name ,  T1.customer_middle_initial ,  T1.customer_last_name FROM Customers AS T1 JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.customer_id  =  T2.customer_id	e_commerce

results.question: What are the id, name, price and color of the products which have not been ordered for at least twice?
results.gold_sql: SELECT product_id ,  product_name ,  product_price ,  product_color FROM Products EXCEPT SELECT T1.product_id ,  T1.product_name ,  T1.product_price ,  T1.product_color FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id JOIN Orders AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id GROUP BY T1.product_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2	e_commerce

current_rag.sql: SELECT T1.product_id , T1.product_name , T1.product_price , T1.product_color FROM Products AS T1 WHERE T1.product_id NOT IN (SELECT T2.product_id FROM Order_Items AS T2 GROUP BY T2.product_id HAVING count(*) >= 2)

broader_rag.sql: SELECT T1.product_id , T1.product_name , T1.product_price , T1.product_color FROM Products AS T1 LEFT JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id GROUP BY T1.product_id HAVING count(T2.order_id) < 2

full_schema.sql: SELECT T1.product_id , T1.product_name , T1.product_price , T1.product_color FROM Products AS T1 LEFT JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id GROUP BY T1.product_id HAVING count(*) < 2

results.question: Which product are listed in orders most frequently? List the id, product name and price.
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.product_id ,  T1.product_name ,  T1.product_price FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id GROUP BY T1.product_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1	e_commerce

results.question: Which order have the least sum of the product prices. List the order id and sum.
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.order_id ,  sum(T2.product_price) FROM Order_items AS T1 JOIN Products AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id GROUP BY T1.order_id ORDER BY sum(T2.product_price) ASC LIMIT 1	e_commerce

current_rag.sql: SELECT T1.order_id , SUM(T2.product_price) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.order_id = T2.order_id GROUP BY T1.order_id ORDER BY SUM(T2.product_price) ASC LIMIT 1

broader_rag.sql: SELECT T1.order_id , SUM(T3.product_price) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.order_id = T2.order_id JOIN Products AS T3 ON T2.product_id = T3.product_id GROUP BY T1.order_id ORDER BY SUM(T3.product_price) ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the order that total cost the least , and how much is the total cost ?
results.gold_sql: select t1.order_id ,  sum(t2.product_price) from order_items as t1 join products as t2 on t1.product_id  =  t2.product_id group by t1.order_id order by sum(t2.product_price) asc limit 1	e_commerce

current_rag.sql: SELECT T1.order_id, SUM(T2.order_item_status_code = 'active') * 10 + SUM(T2.order_item_status_code = 'shipped') * 20 AS total_cost FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.order_id = T2.order_id GROUP BY T1.order_id ORDER BY total_cost ASC LIMIT 1

broader_rag.sql: SELECT T1.order_id, SUM(T2.product_price) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.order_id = T2.order_id GROUP BY T1.order_id ORDER BY SUM(T2.product_price) ASC LIMIT 1

full_schema.sql: SELECT T1.order_id, SUM(T2.product_price) FROM Orders AS T1 JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.order_id = T2.order_id GROUP BY T1.order_id ORDER BY SUM(T2.product_price) ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: List all the distinct product names, price and descriptions which are bought by female customers.
results.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.product_name ,  T1.product_price ,  T1.product_description FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_items AS T2 ON T1.product_id  =  T2.product_id JOIN Orders AS T3 ON T2.order_id  =  T3.order_id JOIN Customers AS T4 ON T3.customer_id  =  T4.customer_id WHERE T4.gender_code  =  'Female'	e_commerce

current_rag.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.product_name, T1.product_price, T1.product_description FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T2.customer_id = T1.parent_product_id

broader_rag.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.product_name, T1.product_price, T1.product_description FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id JOIN Orders AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id JOIN Customers AS T4 ON T3.customer_id = T4.customer_id WHERE T4.gender_code = 'F'

full_schema.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.product_name, T1.product_price, T1.product_description FROM Products AS T1 JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.product_id = T2.product_id JOIN Orders AS T3 ON T2.order_id = T3.order_id JOIN Customers AS T4 ON T3.customer_id = T4.customer_id WHERE T4.gender_code = 'F'
